MigrationConfig.description: Banshee migration configuration. Defines the target repositories, actions to perform, and pull request details.

search_query.description: GitHub code search query used to select target repositories (e.g. "filename:package.json org:example-org"). Mutually exclusive with all_repos_in_org and repos.

all_repos_in_org.description: When true, targets every repository in the organisation. Use with caution. Mutually exclusive with search_query and repos.

repos.description: Explicit list of repositories to migrate (format: org/repo). Recommended for initial testing. Mutually exclusive with search_query and all_repos_in_org.

organisation.description: GitHub organisation slug. Used as the default for repo operations when not inferred from the repo selector.

branch_name.description: Name of the branch created in each target repository for the migration changes.

actions.description: Ordered list of actions to perform on each repository. Each action produces a commit if it changes any files.

pr_title.description: Title of the pull request opened for this migration.

pr_body_file.description: Path to a Markdown file used as the pull request body. Resolved relative to the working directory from which Banshee is invoked.

pr_as_drafts.description: When true, pull requests are created as drafts.

MigrationConfig.title: MigrationConfig

Action.description: A single action to perform on each target repository.

description.description: Commit message used when this action produces file changes.

input.description: Input parameters for the action. Shape depends on the action type.

Action.title: Action

ReplaceInput.description: Input for the replace action. Performs a literal find-and-replace across matching files.

old.description: String to search for and replace.

glob.description: Glob pattern selecting which files to apply the replacement to. Default: **.

ReplaceInput.title: ReplaceInput

RunCommandInput.description: Input for the run_command action. Executes an arbitrary bash command inside the cloned repository.

command.description: Bash command to execute. Runs with the cloned repo as the working directory. The MIGRATION_DIR environment variable is set to the directory containing the migration YAML file.

RunCommandInput.title: RunCommandInput

YAMLInput.description: Input for the yaml action. Makes targeted changes to YAML files using dot-notation paths.

glob.description: Glob pattern selecting which YAML files to modify.

yamlpath.description: Dot-notation path to the target key (e.g. firstlevel.secondlevel).

value.description: Value to set. Not required for the delete sub_action.

YAMLInput.title: YAMLInput

JSONInput.description: Input for the json action. Makes targeted changes to JSON files using dot-notation paths while preserving key order and formatting.

glob.description: Glob pattern selecting which JSON files to modify. Default: **/*.json.

jsonpath.description: Dot-notation path to the target key (e.g. scripts.build).

value.description: Value to set. Not required for the delete sub_action. For list_append, the target path must already exist and be an array.

JSONInput.title: JSONInput

AddFileInput.description: Input for the add_file action. Creates a new file in the repository with the specified content.

file.description: Path and filename to create, relative to the repository root (e.g. .github/workflows/ci.yml).

content.description: Content to write to the new file.

AddFileInput.title: AddFileInput
